summary: Good stadium audience recording with clear AKG sound, crowd decent for a large venue
review: The reviewer praises the AKG omnidirectional capture, noting that the sound is enjoyable and the crowd was tolerable for a stadium setting. No specific musical performance details are given, but the overall impression of the recording is positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review, focusing on sound quality and crowd vibe; no musical details to assess show quality, so rating leans on the strong recording praise.

recording_quality.technical_notes: AKG omnidirectional mic capture praised; sound described as enjoyable and suitable for a stadium audience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on musical performance or set structure.
